name: Aurora — synthetic brand book
_doc: The single source of truth the asset-QA gate judges against. 100% synthetic.

rules.text: Every colour used must come from palette.allowed_hex. #ffb703 is accent-only and must not be a text or background base.
Text over background must meet a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 (WCAG AA).
All paddings/margins must snap to spacing_scale_px; arbitrary values are rejected.
Corner radii must come from radius_scale_px.
Only allowed_fonts, at most 2 families per asset.
Copy must avoid banned_words and stay in the brand voice.
